skill.name: gate-dex-market
skill.description: Gate Wallet market data and token info queries. K-line, transaction stats, liquidity, token details, rankings, security audit, new token discovery. Use when users ask about market data, prices, or token info. All queries require no authentication. Not for executing trades.
skill.summary: Read-only cryptocurrency market data query skill for Gate DEX. Provides K-line charts, transaction stats, token details, rankings, and security audits.
skill.author: gate

security_audit.summary: All static findings are false positives. The skill queries public cryptocurrency market data through Gate DEX MCP server. Detected 'external_commands' are markdown code blocks, 'filesystem' is user config path, and 'weak cryptographic algorithm' is financial candlestick terminology (K-line). No actual security risks found.

content.value_statement: Get cryptocurrency market data, token prices, transaction stats, liquidity info, and security audits from Gate DEX. Helps users research tokens before trading.
actual_capabilities: Query K-line (candlestick) chart data for any token on multiple chains
Get transaction statistics including buy/sell counts and volumes
Retrieve token details such as price, market cap, holders, and social links
View token rankings by market cap, volume, or price change
Discover newly listed tokens within a time range
Perform security audits to check token risk level and audit status
limitations: Does not execute trades - read-only data queries only
Requires MCP server configuration - cannot function without it
No authentication support - only queries public data
Limited to chains supported by Gate DEX MCP server

use_cases.title: Research Token Before Trading
use_cases.description: Query token details, K-line data, transaction stats, and security audit to make informed trading decisions.
use_cases.target_user: Cryptocurrency traders wanting to research tokens

use_cases.title: Track Market Trends
use_cases.description: Get rankings by volume or price change to identify trending tokens and market opportunities.

use_cases.title: Discover New Tokens
use_cases.description: Find newly listed tokens on supported chains to identify early investment opportunities.
use_cases.target_user: Investors looking for new token launches

prompt_templates.title: Get Token Market Data
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the current market data for [TOKEN_NAME] on [CHAIN] including K-line data, transaction stats, and liquidity info.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants comprehensive market overview for a specific token

prompt_templates.title: Check Token Security
prompt_templates.prompt: Perform a security audit on token [TOKEN_ADDRESS] on [CHAIN]. What is the risk level and are there any security concerns?
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to verify token safety before trading

prompt_templates.title: View Token Rankings
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the top 10 tokens by [VOLUME/MARKET_CAP/PRICE_CHANGE] on [CHAIN].
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to see market rankings

prompt_templates.title: Discover New Tokens
prompt_templates.prompt: List any newly created tokens on [CHAIN] in the last 24 hours.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to find newly launched tokens

output_examples.input: Show me market data for USDT on Ethereum
output_examples.output: Current Price: $1.00 | 24h Change: +0.01% | Liquidity: $250M | 24h Volume: $50M | Buys: 12,500 | Sells: 11,800

output_examples.input: What's the risk level for token 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7
output_examples.output: Risk Level: Low ✅ | Contract Verified: Yes | Audited: Yes | Owner Renounced: No

output_examples.input: Show top 10 tokens by volume on Ethereum
output_examples.output: Rank #1: USDT ($50B vol) | #2: USDC ($30B vol) | #3: WETH ($15B vol) | #4: DAI ($8B vol)...

best_practices: Always check security audit before trading unfamiliar tokens
Use K-line data with appropriate time intervals for analysis
Cross-reference multiple data points for informed decisions
anti_patterns: Do not treat this as trading advice - data is for reference only
Do not assume all tokens are safe even with 'low' risk rating
Do not skip security checks on newly discovered tokens

faq.question: Does this skill execute trades?
faq.answer: No. This skill only queries public market data. It cannot execute any on-chain transactions.

faq.question: Do I need authentication to use this skill?
faq.answer: No. All tools query public data and require no authentication.

faq.question: What chains are supported?
faq.answer: This skill supports multiple chains including ETH, BSC, and other chains supported by Gate DEX. Check MCP server documentation for the full list.

faq.question: How accurate is the security audit?
faq.answer: Security audit data comes from Gate's risk assessment system. Always do your own research before trading.

faq.question: Can I get real-time prices?
faq.answer: Yes, the MCP tools return current market data from Gate DEX exchanges.

faq.question: What if the MCP server is not configured?
faq.answer: The skill will show configuration instructions. You need to set up the Gate MCP server in your AI tool first.
